arts.ttl: Eddie Howe says his focus is on lifting a trophy with Newcastle
arts.sum: The 46-year-old has not ruled out taking on the England job one day.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's Eddie Howe confirms England preference, labels Thomas Tuchel 'one of the best' coaches
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe confirms that he was not interviewed by the Football Association to become the next England manager.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's verdict on succeeding Thomas Tuchel as England boss amid burnout fear
arts.sum: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe was the top English candidate to be the next England boss but was not considered as Thomas Tuchel was handed the role

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday eight this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top-flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe confirms England snub and gives honest verdict on Thomas Tuchel call
arts.sum: Eddie Howe had been seen as a leading contender for the England manager's job, but the FA opted to appoint Thomas Tuchel instead of speaking to the Newcastle boss

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak injury update as Newcastle United boss rules out experienced star for 'a few weeks'
arts.sum: Howe stated that Isak's toe injury had now "healed" and while Wilson may require more time, he is not completely out of contention for the weekend. Howe, speaking at his pre-match Press conference ahead of the home clash with Brighton & Hove Albion, said: "Alex has trained well and trained well.

arts.ttl: I was not interviewed for England job - Howe
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe says he was not contacted by the Football Association in their recent hunt for a new England manager.

arts.ttl: Brighton head coach Fabian Hürzeler comments on England’s appointment of Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Since it was announced on Wednesday morning that Thomas Tuchel would succeed Gareth Southgate as the new England head coach, the reaction has been significantly mixed. While there have been…

arts.ttl: Fabian Hurzeler hopes Brighton can build on comeback victory over Tottenham
arts.sum: Brighton came from 2-0 down to beat Tottenham 3-2.

arts.ttl: Yankuba Minteh's message ahead of Newcastle United return as agent breaks silence after Toon exit
arts.sum: The right winger looks to have found his feet already at Brighton despite adjusting to the Premier League after playing in Holland and Denmark respectively in recent years. The winger's agent, who initially got him a trial with Odense before a successful loan move to Feyenoord, told Chronicle Live before the game: "Yankuba told me before the international break that he is looking forward to finally playing at St James' Park.
